title: Cache validates NVM ID via nvm_metadata on every hit
description: find_cached_or_scan always calls nvm_metadata to verify the cached NVM ID before trusting it, even on a cache hit. This prevents stale-cache bugs when a concurrent client deletes and recreates an object under the same label but a different NVM ID. A contributor might suggest removing this validation to save a round-trip ('just trust the cache'). Do not do that: the ID reassignment scenario is real in multi-client wolfHSM deployments, and the metadata call is a single round-trip with negligible overhead compared to the nvm_read that follows.
